modules.name: ctpbee.app
documentation: coding:utf-8

classes.name: ctpbee.app.CtpBee

methods.name: ctpbee.app.CtpBee.__init__
documentation:
name: 创建运行核心的名字
import_name: 导入包的名字, 用__name__即可'
action_class: 执行器 > 默认使用系统自带的Action, 或者由用户继承,然后传入类
engine_method: Actor模型采用的底层的引擎
logger_class: logger类,可以自己定义
work_mode: 判断工作模式 默认为API, 可以填为`dispatcher`
refresh: 是否自己主动查询账户 默认开启
交易api与行情api / trade api and market api

methods.name: ctpbee.app.CtpBee.add_data
documentation:
在回测模式下添加历史数据到系统中去

Args:
  data (list): 多个数据载入

Examples:
    # first style
    app.add_data(data1_iter, data2_iter)

    # second style
    data = [data1_iter, data2_iter)
    app.add_data(*data)

methods.name: ctpbee.app.CtpBee.update_action_class
documentation:
更新操作类,除了在CtpBee的构造函数中传入action外, 你还可以通过此接口更新Action类

Args:
  action_class (Action): 操作类

methods.name: ctpbee.app.CtpBee.make_config
documentation: 生成config实例

methods.name: ctpbee.app.CtpBee.auto_find_instance_path

methods.name: ctpbee.app.CtpBee.md_login_status

methods.name: ctpbee.app.CtpBee._running
documentation:
根据当前配置文件下的信息载入行情api和交易api
注意此函数同时会根据构造函数中的refresh参数决定开启定时线程, 向CtpBee里面提供定时查询账户持仓功能

functions.name: ctpbee.helpers.check
documentation:

  Returns:

functions.name: ctpbee.helpers.dynamic_loading_api
documentation:
主要是用来通过文件动态载入策略。 返回策略类的实例, 应该通过CtpBee.add_extension() 加以载入
你需要在策略代码文件中显式指定ext

  Args:
     f (fs): 文件IO对象

  Returns:
     CtpbeeApi: 编译好的CtpbeeApi实例对象

functions.name: ctpbee.helpers.auth_time
documentation:
检查时间是否合法
todo: 添加市场以兼容股票或者其他的市场

 Args:
    timed (datetime): 时间对象

 Returns:
    bool: 验证结果

functions.name: ctpbee.helpers.run_forever
documentation:
永久运行一个APP

 Args:
    app (CtpBee): app实例

 Returns:
    None

functions.name: ctpbee.helpers.refresh_query
documentation:
fixme: 或许此函数会消耗大量性能 能不能按照0.5s 作为一次判断 
针对流控,实现循环查询,此函数应该在另外一个线程调用

同时给common_signal传递1s一个信号基准

Args:
   app (CtpBee): App实例
   signals(CommonSignals): 公共信号
   refresh(bool): 是否后台更新持仓和账户数据

functions.name: ctpbee.helpers.call
documentation:
此装饰器是为了减少代码, 主要是用来执行插件的回调方法

functions.name: ctpbee.helpers.async_call
documentation:

modules.name: ctpbee.indicator.indicator
documentation:
纯numpy实现指标计算方法

注:大部分来自于网上

functions.name: ctpbee.indicator.indicator.std
documentation: 计算方差

functions.name: ctpbee.indicator.indicator.ma
documentation: 移动平均线

functions.name: ctpbee.indicator.indicator.ewma
documentation:
copy from <https://blog.csdn.net/Shepherdppz/article/details/104120689>

Reshapes data before calculating EWMA, then iterates once over the rows
to calculate the offset without precision issues
\:param data: Input data, will be flattened.
\:param alpha: scalar float in range (0,1)

> The alpha parameter for the moving average.

```
param row_size

int, optional
The row size to use in the computation. High row sizes need higher precision,
low values will impact performance. The optimal value depends on the
platform and the alpha being used. Higher alpha values require lower
row size. Default depends on dtype.

param dtype

optional
Data type used for calculations. Defaults to float64 unless
data.dtype is float32, then it will use float32.

param order

{'C', 'F', 'A'}, optional
Order to use when flattening the data. Defaults to 'C'.

param out

ndarray, or None, optional
A location into which the result is stored. If provided, it must have
the same shape as the desired output. If not provided or ,
a freshly-allocated array is returned.

return

The flattened result.
```

functions.name: ctpbee.indicator.indicator.ewma_vectorized
documentation:
Calculates the exponential moving average over a vector.
Will fail for large inputs.
\:param data: Input data
\:param alpha: scalar float in range (0,1)

> The alpha parameter for the moving average.

```
param offset

optional
The offset for the moving average, scalar. Defaults to data[0].

param dtype

optional
Data type used for calculations. Defaults to float64 unless
data.dtype is float32, then it will use float32.

param order

{'C', 'F', 'A'}, optional
Order to use when flattening the data. Defaults to 'C'.

param out

ndarray, or None, optional
A location into which the result is stored. If provided, it must have
the same shape as the input. If not provided or ,
a freshly-allocated array is returned.
```

functions.name: ctpbee.indicator.indicator.ewma_vectorized_2d
documentation:
Calculates the exponential moving average over a given axis.
\:param data: Input data, must be 1D or 2D array.
\:param alpha: scalar float in range (0,1)

> The alpha parameter for the moving average.

```
param axis

The axis to apply the moving average on.
If axis==None, the data is flattened.

param offset

optional
The offset for the moving average. Must be scalar or a
vector with one element for each row of data. If set to None,
defaults to the first value of each row.

param dtype

optional
Data type used for calculations. Defaults to float64 unless
data.dtype is float32, then it will use float32.

param order

{'C', 'F', 'A'}, optional
Order to use when flattening the data. Ignored if axis is not None.

param out

ndarray, or None, optional
A location into which the result is stored. If provided, it must have
the same shape as the desired output. If not provided or ,
a freshly-allocated array is returned.
```

functions.name: ctpbee.indicator.indicator.macd
documentation:
移动平均趋同/偏离(异同移动平均线) MACDHisto
Formula:
    - macd = ema(data, me1_period) - ema(data, me2_period)
    - signal = ema(macd, signal_period)
    - histo = macd - signal

functions.name: ctpbee.indicator.indicator.kdj
documentation:
---
param close: ndarray, close price
param high: ndarray, high price
param low: ndarray, low price
param m1: int, the weight of K value
param m2: int, the weight of D value
param n: int, the length of KDJ indicator
return: tuple, (K, D, J)
---

modules.name: ctpbee.context.proxy
documentation:
code are from [werkzeug](https://werkzeug.palletsprojects.com/en/2.0.x/) !!!
In order to reduce the package volume, just copy code into here

functions.name: ctpbee.context.proxy.release_local
documentation:
Releases the contents of the local for the current context.
This makes it possible to use locals without a manager.

Example:

```
>>> loc = Local()
>>> loc.foo = 42
>>> release_local(loc)
>>> hasattr(loc, 'foo')
False
```

With this function one can release {class}`Local` objects as well
as {class}`LocalStack` objects.  However, it is not possible to
release data held by proxies that way, one always has to retain
a reference to the underlying local object in order to be able
to release it.

:::{versionadded} 0.6.1
:::

functions.name: ctpbee.context.proxy._l_to_r_op
documentation: Swap the argument order to turn an l-op into an r-op.

documentation: 根据CtpBee的名字找到CtpBee 对象

classes.name: ctpbee.context.proxy.ContextVar
documentation:
A fake ContextVar based on the previous greenlet/threading
ident function. Used on Python 3.6, eventlet, and old versions
of gevent.

methods.name: ctpbee.context.proxy.Local.__call__
documentation: Create a proxy for a name.

classes.name: ctpbee.context.proxy._ProxyLookup

methods.name: ctpbee.context.proxy._ProxyLookup.__call__
documentation:
Support calling unbound methods from the class. For example,
this happens with `copy.copy`, which does
`type(x).__copy__(x)`. `type(x)` can't be proxied, so it
returns the proxy type and descriptor.

Descriptor that handles proxied attribute lookup for
{class}`LocalProxy`.

```
param f

The built-in function this attribute is accessed through.
Instead of looking up the special method, the function call
is redone on the object.

param fallback

Call this method if the proxy is unbound instead of
raising a .

param class_value

Value to return when accessed from the class.
Used for __doc__ so building docs still works.
```

classes.name: ctpbee.context.proxy._ProxyIOp
documentation:
Look up an augmented assignment method on a proxied object. The
method is wrapped to return the proxy instead of the object.

classes.name: ctpbee.context.proxy.LocalProxy

methods.name: ctpbee.context.proxy.LocalProxy._get_current_object
documentation:
Return the current object.  This is useful if you want the real
object behind the proxy at a time for performance reasons or because
you want to pass the object into a different context.

class_variables.name: ctpbee.context.proxy.LocalProxy.__str__
documentation: type: ignore

class_variables.name: ctpbee.context.proxy.LocalProxy.__format__
documentation: type: ignore

class_variables.name: ctpbee.context.proxy.LocalProxy.__eq__
documentation: type: ignore

class_variables.name: ctpbee.context.proxy.LocalProxy.__ne__
documentation: type: ignore

class_variables.name: ctpbee.context.proxy.LocalProxy.__hash__
documentation: type: ignore

class_variables.name: ctpbee.context.proxy.LocalProxy.__setattr__
documentation: type: ignore

class_variables.name: ctpbee.context.proxy.LocalProxy.__delattr__
documentation: type: ignore

class_variables.name: ctpbee.context.proxy.LocalProxy.__dir__
documentation: type: ignore

class_variables.name: ctpbee.context.proxy.LocalProxy.__class__
documentation: type: ignore

A proxy to the object bound to a {class}`Local`. All operations
on the proxy are forwarded to the bound object. If no object is
bound, a {exc}`RuntimeError` is raised.

```python
from werkzeug.local import Local
l = Local()

# a proxy to whatever l.user is set to
user = l("user")

from werkzeug.local import LocalStack
_request_stack = LocalStack()

# a proxy to _request_stack.top
request = _request_stack()

# a proxy to the session attribute of the request proxy
session = LocalProxy(lambda: request.session)
```

`__repr__` and `__class__` are forwarded, so `repr(x)` and
`isinstance(x, cls)` will look like the proxied object. Use
`issubclass(type(x), LocalProxy)` to check if an object is a
proxy.

```python
repr(user)  # <User admin>
isinstance(user, User)  # True
issubclass(type(user), LocalProxy)  # True
```

```
param local

The  or callable that provides the
proxied object.

param name

The attribute name to look up on a . Not
used if a callable is given.
```

:::{versionchanged} 2.0 Updated proxied attributes and methods to reflect the current data model.
:::

:::{versionchanged} 0.6.1 The class can be instantiated with a callable.
:::

methods.name: ctpbee.context.proxy.LocalStack.push
documentation: Pushes a new item to the stack

methods.name: ctpbee.context.proxy.LocalStack.pop
documentation:
Removes the topmost item from the stack, will return the
old value or `None` if the stack was already empty.

methods.name: ctpbee.context.proxy.LocalStack.top
documentation:
The topmost item on the stack.  If the stack is empty,
`None` is returned.

documentation:

Args:
  price (float): 价格

  volume(float): 手数, 股票会自动*100

  origin(Any(BarData, TradeData, TickData, OrderData, PositionData)): 快速获取品种和交易所信息

  price_type(OrderType): 价格类型

Returns:
  str: 单号

methods.name: ctpbee.level.Action.cancel

type.name: BarData or TickData or TradeData or OrderData or PositionData

documentation:
撤单, 在不涉传递origin的情况下请使用local_symbol和exchange字段传递值

Args:
  id (Text): 单号

  origin(Any(BarData, TradeData, TickData, OrderData, PositionData)): 快速获取品种和交易所信息

  exchange(Exchange): 交易所代码

  local_symbol(str): 合约代码

Returns:
  str: 单号

Example:
    self.cancel("id1", tick)
    # or
    self.cancel("id2", None, exchange=Exchange.SHFE, local_symbol="rb2101.SHFE")

methods.name: ctpbee.level.Action.get_req
documentation:
用来获取平仓请求单的函数
Args:
  local_symbol (Text): 本地合约代码

  direction(Direction)): 快速获取品种和交易所信息

  volume(float): 手数

  app(CtpBee): 核心App

Returns:
  List[[Offset, volume]]: 持仓构成

methods.name: ctpbee.level.Action.send_order
documentation:
底层的发单请求
Args:
  order (OrderRequest): 发单请求

Returns:
  str: 发单id
默认四个提供API的封装, 买多卖空等快速函数应该基于send_order进行封装 / default to provide four function

底层的撤单请求

Returns:

methods.name: ctpbee.level.Action.query_position
documentation:
底层的查持仓请求, 注意只会发送查询请求,不会返回持仓数据

Returns:
  int:  本地查询发送成功与否

methods.name: ctpbee.level.Action.query_account
documentation:
底层的查账户数据请求, 注意只会发送查询请求,不会返回账户数据

Returns:
  int: 本地查询发送成功与否

Returns:
  int: 本地订阅发送成功与否

methods.name: ctpbee.level.Action.unsubscribe
documentation:
取消订阅请求
Args:
  local_symbol (AnyStr): 合约代码

Returns:
  int: 本地订阅发送成功与否

自定义的操作模板
此动作应该被CtpBee, CtpbeeApi, AsyncAp i, RiskLevel调用

methods.name: ctpbee.level.CtpbeeApi.route
documentation:
装饰器, 指定路由, 为了方便用户不想写类接口体而存在

Args:
  handler(str): 接口类型, 应该为EVENT_TICK此类常量或者"tick", 参见constant.py下面的参数

Examples:
  strategy = CtpbeeApi("hello_api")

  @strategy.route(handler="tick")
  def handle_tick(self, tick):
    print(tick)

methods.name: ctpbee.level.CtpbeeApi.register
documentation: 装饰器, 用于注册函数

数据模块/策略模块 都是基于此实现的, 如果你要开发上述插件需要继承此抽象demo

Example:
  class Processor(CtpbeeApi):
      ...

  data_processor = Processor("data_processor", app)
            or
  data_processor = Processor("data_processor")
  data_processor.init_app(app)
  #           or
  app.add_extension(Process("data_processor"))
